rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MANUELA MESA MARTIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, Evidence Sanctions And Terminating Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Granted. The Will Contest is stricken in light of petitioner¿s failure to respond to discovery after being ordered to do so. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 2/8/12.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE KONSTIN FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Thomas H. Bomar'S Notice Of And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Stephen C. Ubl; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners have relied in their opposition memorandum on facts and theories not plead in their petition. Bomar¿s motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted with 10 days leave to amend to plead facts addressing the standing and substantive issues if petitioners can do so in good faith. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 2/8/12.
